title: Conversations: N+1 queries per conversation entry
description: File: src/posting.rs:list_conversations. For each conversation in list_conversations, the code executes: 1) load_status (which itself does multiple queries), 2) a COUNT query for read markers, 3) a fetch for the post author, 4) a fetch_all for mentions, 5) individual fetches per mentioned account. For a page of 20 conversations, this is easily 100+ queries. Consider fetching read markers and mentions in batch (WHERE post_id IN (...)) outside the loop.
